roles.title: Student Assistant
roles.description: Mentors: Dr. Doru Thom Popovici and Dr. Katherine Klymko. Performing large-scale hybrid qubit-qumode (CV/DV) simulations on HPC systems; developing and optimizing simulation kernels; running benchmarking studies; analyzing performance and scalability; and contributing technical improvements to hybrid quantum simulation workflows.

roles.title: Graduate Research Assistant
